surveys.title: English Table Feedback Questionnaire (114-1, Revised 1013) / English Table 回饋問卷 (114-1, 修訂版 1013)
surveys.description: 基本資料（年級、科系、本學期參與 ET 次數）＋口語能力 18 題（1=非常不同意～5=非常同意）＋延伸題（聯絡信箱，選填）。注意：每位學生每學期只需填寫一次此問卷。 / Basic Information (Grade, Department, ET Participation This Semester) + 18 Oral Skills Questions (1=Strongly Disagree ~ 5=Strongly Agree) + Extended Questions (Contact Email, Optional). Note: Each student only needs to fill out this survey once per semester.

questions.label: 學號 / Student ID
姓名 / Name
Email
年級 / Grade
options: 高年級(大三以上含碩博士) / Upperclassman (Junior and above including Graduate students)

questions.label: 科系（請填寫就讀科系） / Department (Please specify your major)
本學期參與 ET 次數 / ET Participation This Semester
我能更流利地用英文談論我的個人經驗和意見。 / I can more fluently discuss my personal experiences and opinions in English.
我能對個人問題給出更詳細和有趣的回答。 / I can give more detailed and interesting answers to personal questions.
我能更精準地使用英文描述圖表訊息或文章內容。 / I can more accurately describe chart information or article content in English.
我能在活動討論中使用英文整理及表達個人想法。 / I can organize and express my personal thoughts in English during activity discussions.
活動進行中，我能使用生活例子來解釋及強化個人觀點。 / During activities, I can use life examples to explain and strengthen my personal viewpoints.
我能將英文將課程主題與現實生活中的例子連結起來。 / I can connect course topics with real-life examples in English.
我現在比參加「ET」之前對說英文更有自信。 / I am now more confident about speaking English than before participating in 'ET'.
我說英文時比較不緊張或害怕犯錯。 / I am less nervous or afraid of making mistakes when speaking English.
我更願意在課堂上或在「ET」以外與他人用英文交談。 / I am more willing to communicate in English with others in class or outside of 'ET'.

除修課規定外，我有個人理由參加「ET」活動，例如認識朋友、開口練習英文或者喜歡與他人互動！ / Besides course requirements, I have personal reasons for participating in 'ET' activities, such as making friends, practicing English speaking, or enjoying interaction with others!
每天不同的主題和任務使我更有興趣參與。 / Different daily themes and tasks make me more interested in participating.
我計劃未來繼續參加「ET」（或類似活動）。 / I plan to continue participating in 'ET' (or similar activities) in the future.
我在討論中會用自己的話總結主要想法。 / I summarize main ideas in my own words during discussions.
當我無法理解話題內容時，我會主動尋找桌長或其他人協助。 / When I cannot understand the topic content, I actively seek help from table leaders or others.
我會遵守輪流發言的規範，因為每個人都應該享有開口練習英文的機會。 / I follow the turn-taking rules because everyone should have the opportunity to practice speaking English.
這種由同儕主導、以討論為基礎的模式，幫助我更勇敢開口說英文。 / This peer-led, discussion-based model helps me be more courageous in speaking English.
「ET」氣氛佳且互動性強，使我說英文時感到很自在。 / 'ET' has a good atmosphere and strong interactivity, making me feel comfortable when speaking English.
總體來說，「ET」對於提升我的英文口說技能是有益的。 / Overall, 'ET' is beneficial for improving my English speaking skills.
若願意接受 EMI 中心訪談，請留下聯絡信箱（選填）。 / If you are willing to participate in EMI Center interviews, please leave your contact email (optional).

surveys.title: English Club Feedback Questionnaire (114-1) / English Club 回饋問卷 (114-1)
surveys.description: 本問卷旨在收集學生對 English Club 活動的滿意度與英語學習成效之回饋。注意：每位學生每學期只需填寫一次此問卷。 / This questionnaire aims to collect student feedback on English Club activities' satisfaction and English learning effectiveness. Note: Each student only needs to fill out this survey once per semester.

questions.label: 學號 / Student ID
姓名 / Name
Email
系所 / Department
年級 / Year
為什麼參加 English Club? / Why do you participate in English Club?
options: 課程加分 / 課程要求 / Course bonus / Course requirement
英語實踐歷程集點 / English practice points
我想提升英文能力 / I want to improve my English skills
我想認識並結交新朋友 / I want to meet and make new friends

questions.label: 透過何種管道得知 English Club? / How did you learn about English Club?
options: EMI中心官網 / EMI Center official website
EMI中心 Facebook / EMI Center Facebook
EMI中心 Instagram / EMI Center Instagram
同學口耳相傳 / Word of mouth from classmates

questions.label: 整體而言，我對這學期 English Club 感到滿意。 / Overall, I am satisfied with this semester's English Club.
活動時間對我來說是方便的。 / The activity time is convenient for me.
活動地點及位置是合宜的。 / The activity location and venue are appropriate.
English Club 主題有助於意見分享及交流。 / English Club topics facilitate opinion sharing and exchange.
活動指導老師帶領方式有效率、禮貌且專業。 / The activity instructor's leadership is efficient, polite, and professional.
活動指導老師鼓勵我開口說英文。 / The activity instructor encourages me to speak English.
English Club 能符合我的學習英文需求。 / English Club meets my English learning needs.
English Club 提升了我學習英文的興趣。 / English Club has increased my interest in learning English.
參加 English Club 讓我擴展人際關係。 / Participating in English Club has helped me expand my interpersonal relationships.
參加 English Club 幫助我提升哪些能力？ / What abilities has participating in English Club helped me improve?
options: 開口說英文的自信 / Confidence in speaking English

questions.label: 請簡述您本身英語文能力提升情形 / Please briefly describe your English language ability improvement
我有意願於未來繼續參加 English Club 活動。 / I am willing to continue participating in English Club activities in the future.
如有其他意見，也歡迎告訴我們 / If you have any other comments, please feel free to let us know
